description: Pins the non-positive dashboard_id rejection both languages share and the get GET. Missing/non-integer dashboard_id text diverges (Go 'dashboard_id is required'/'positive integer' vs Python 'dashboard_id must be a valid integer'), so only the non-positive case is fixtured (see report).

cases.name: rejects non-positive dashboard_id
cases.expect_error: dashboard_id must be a positive integer
